strengthening_paths.suggestion: Add a minimal rational J=2 numerical witness template for Conjecture 1, even before proof, to make the strict inclusion target falsifiable.
Sharpen Conjecture 2 by stating whether the kink is claimed for both endpoints or at least one endpoint, and whether the first breakpoint is unique.
Add Kédagni-style imperfect-instrument/nonparametric-bound comparisons in Related work as a robustness check against missed partial-ID IV bounds literature.

recommended_next_step: Proceed to Stage 0 with Conjecture 1 as the primary derivation target and Conjecture 2 as a secondary strengthening.
